_comment: Curated subset of examples/configs/popular-public-servers.json for the hero GIF. Only PUBLIC servers that launch standalone with no auth token and no real-path argument, so a CONNECTED scan stays clean and reproducible (no 'failed to connect' rows, no setup). Safe to run - it scans ONLY this file and never reads your real MCP configs: `mcp-audit scan --config docs/assets/hero-demo-config.json --config-only --ssrf-check`. Versions track examples/configs/popular-public-servers.json (pinned 2026-06-02); bump them together.
